name: ⚰️ the vampire diaries rpg [c] [req.] ⚰️
description:
𝒔𝒖𝒅𝒅𝒆𝒏𝒍𝒚 𝒂 𝒈𝒊𝒍𝒃𝒆𝒓𝒕—𝒖𝒏𝒊𝒗𝒆𝒓𝒔𝒆 𝒔𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒄𝒉

similar to my last one, but you can now insert your oc in their own body!

turns out i didn’t fully comprehend what the requester meant last time, so here’s another version with that user’s original intention preserved! in this version, you’re not in jeremy’s body but rather entirely replace the very concept of him.

plotline focuses on the trope of finding oneself in the tv show’s world as the result of a bizarre, supernatural occurrence.

based on numerous characters from the cw’s ‘the vampire diaries’, ‘the originals’, and can include ‘legacies’ if desired.

made by request for anon.
want to request a bot? go to my carrd.

[this bot was made by darkvioletsxox on janitorai.com or character.ai; if you see this bot elsewhere, it has been stolen.]
